name: Super Quantal Union - Magnaformation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>量</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－マグナフォーメーション
desc: Your opponent cannot target "Super Quant" cards on the field with card effects during your Main Phase 1. You can target 1 "Super Quant" Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 other face-up monster you control to it as material. You can only use this effect of "Super Quantal Union - Magnaformation" once per turn.
eff: Your opponent cannot target "Super Quant" cards on the field with card effects during your Main Phase 1. You can target 1 "Super Quant" Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 other face-up monster you control to it as material. You can only use this effect of "Super Quantal Union - Magnaformation" once per turn.

action: Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
